metadata.description: Comprehensive engineering skills. Tracker-agnostic (GitHub / Jira / local docs), language-agnostic.

plugins.name: engineering-core
plugins.description: Start here. The 4 everyday commands — align, build, review, debug — that hand off to each other. Zero config. Install this OR the full pack, not both.

plugins.name: engineering-skills
plugins.description: The full pack: align → document → plan → build → test → review → debug → improve (14 skills). Works with GitHub, Jira, or local markdown issue docs, and any language.
